channel.title: Go Humble! RSS Software
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle software bundles!

item.title: Unreal Environment Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Craft beautiful vistas in a fraction of the time it normally takes your team with the all-new Unreal Environment Bundle. Set the scene for epic boss battles, cozy sims, and more with crisp, easy-to-use preset Environmental Packs like Coast & Dunes, Mountain, Forest, Meadow, and more. Add layers of detailed depth to any scenery or scenario with asset sets that mesh seamlessly with each other. Unlock everything you need from the ground up with these elite environmental tools from NatureManufacture, and help support the Starlight Children's Foundation with your purchase!



Bundle ends: 2026-07-02T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 501.4 hours / 20.89 days

item.title: Creature and Character Creation Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Bring monstrosities, blood-dripping creatures, and ghastly ghouls to life with a curated bundle of assets designed to get your players’ hearts pumping! Pay what you want for hundreds of specialized asset packs that work seamlessly with your preferred creation platforms, such as VDM Blender and ZBrush, including Faceit: Facial Expressions and Performance Capture and Base Mesh Mega Pack 3D Models - Human, Anime & Cartoon Animals. Plus, your purchase includes 44 ears, 44 teeth, 44 noses, and much, much more. Create amazing monsters before it’s too late, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before October 31, 2026.

Bundle ends: 2026-07-01T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 477.4 hours / 19.89 days

item.title: Bigger Better Bundle
item.content:encoded:
The Bigger Better Bundle brings together a 65 pack collection of premium and professional game development content from Meshingun Studio and Dekogon Studios. Explore complete environments, modular building systems, foliage, props, materials, decorations, vehicles, and world-building tools across fantasy, historical, modern, industrial, and stylized themes. Save countless hours of production with a library built for developers, artists, and studios who want AAA-quality content without the AAA production time, and help support the Forest School Foundation with your purchase!

Save countless hours of production with a library built for developers, artists, and studios who want AAA-quality content without the AAA production time.

Build Bigger 🚀

Keys Expire. Please redeem before May 19th, 2027. Professional Fab Marketplace keys and Unity Asset Store keys provided.



Bundle ends: 2026-06-30T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 453.4 hours / 18.89 days

item.title: Vast Fantasy Worlds Game Dev Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Build everything from skybound cities and towering realms to dark dungeons, futuristic settings, and enchanted adventures with over 400 assets from the Vast Fantasy Worlds Bundle by KitBash3D. This curated collection gives artists a versatile range of detailed assets for crafting immersive, story-rich environments with speed and flexibility. Whether you're creating for games, film, or concept art, these fully customizable kits are designed to fit seamlessly into your workflow. Compatible with Blender, Unreal, Unity, Maya, and more. Plus, your purchase helps support Girls Who Code!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 29th, 2027.



Bundle ends: 2026-06-29T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 429.4 hours / 17.89 days

item.title: The Complete Unity AI Bundle
item.description: Discover what’s possible with Unity AI
item.content:encoded:
Pay what you want to learn how to use Unity AI, the ultimate AI assistant from the pros at Mammoth Club. Unity AI is your agentic assistant—editor-integrated, project-aware, and designed to streamline your workflows. It’s also your AI gateway, connecting directly to your models and tools to maximize performance, security, and control, while serving as your bridge to Unity from your IDE or preferred application. Highlighted by lessons like Build a TikTok LIVE Game with Unity AI - Interactive Chat-Controlled Game, this curated collection offers everything you need to become an AI mastermind. Save time, money, and reduce operational friction with the Complete Unity AI Bundle before it’s gone!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before July 07, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-07-07T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 621.4 hours / 25.89 days

item.title: The 2026 Learn Unity Game Development Bundle
item.description: Unlock your creative side with Unity
item.content:encoded:
Your new career in game development is only a click away with The 2026 Learn Unity Game Development Bundle! No prior knowledge is needed for this curated collection of lessons from GameDev.tv—just come prepared with a curious mind and a passion for gaming. Get started today and create your own RPG, 2D adventure, and more with courses like Unity Turn Based Strategy Course and Unity Real Time Strategy Course. Get the expert instruction you need from pros in the field, and help support Trees, Water & People with your purchase!

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 25th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-25T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 333.4 hours / 13.89 days

item.title: Krotos Cinematic Sound Suite
item.content:encoded:
Add epic sound effects on the fly with the unmatched power of Krotos Studio! Trusted by creative leaders like Disney, EPIC Games, EA, and more, Krotos delivers frictionless, professional-quality audio production. Easily drag and drop sounds into popular programs like Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve, or integrate Krotos directly into your DAW for unparalleled creative control. Unlock Krotos Studio through Humble Bundle today and enjoy 3 free months of service, plus additional starter sound effect libraries to kick-start your projects. Pay what you want for elite audio creation tools and help support the Starlight Children's Foundation with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-24T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 309.4 hours / 12.89 days

item.title: Fantasy Game Dev Assets By Synty
item.content:encoded:
Game developers, rejoice! The pros at Synty Studios are here to help you take your project from baseline to beta with our latest Software Bundle. Build your worlds with professional-quality assets like photorealistic particle effects, prepare for lifelike duels with a fantasy rival pack, and more. Add complex interfaces or simple dungeons—anything you need to help bring your dream game to life. You’ll even get a $10 voucher for the Synty Studios store to keep creating. Pay what you want for AAA-quality assets and help support Code.org with your purchase.

Keys expire. All titles should be redeemed before June 31st, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-22T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 261.4 hours / 10.89 days

item.title: The Complete Business and AI Certification Bundle
item.description: Bolster your business with AI support
item.content:encoded:
It’s time to level up your business tech skills—develop the fundamental knowledge needed to prepare for operation-changing AI certification exams with our latest Software Bundle. This comprehensive curriculum contains everything you need to develop pivotal AI skills across the most popular business platforms from companies like Microsoft and Google. Highlighted by courses like Asana Workflow Specialist Certificate with Practice Exam and Project Management Institute - Project Management Professional (PMP) with Practice Exam, two of many first-time Humble Bundle Exclusives. Streamline your business with AI support and help Make-A-Wish with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem your keys before Jun 22, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-22T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 261.4 hours / 10.89 days

item.title: Learn Unreal Engine 2026 Course Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Harness the power of Unreal Engine with our latest Software Learning Bundle by Zenva. This expert-led collection contains specialized courses designed to help you build any genre of game: integrate strategy and base building into your next project with Build a Tower Defense Game in Unreal Engine, scare the pants off players with Make a Horror Game in Unreal Engine, or add a splash of retro fun with Develop a Classic Shoot 'em Up with Unreal Engine. Get serious about game design for a price you choose and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 18th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 165.4 hours / 6.89 days

item.title: Melodic Mayhem Vol. 2: A Comprehensive Audio and Music Bundle
item.description: So much melodic mayhem we had to drop a Vol. 2!
item.content:encoded:
Create the perfect audioscape for your next game or creative project with the Melodic Mayhem Vol. 2: A Comprehensive Audio and Music Bundle. Highlights from this extensive library of beta-ready assets include the Reece Coetzer Voice Over Pack, Ambient Music Pack Vol. 5, Fantasy UI Sound FX Pack, and more. Explore a variety of genres, from Heavy Metal guitars to soothing fantasy strings and everything in between. Get the assets you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and support a charity of your choice with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 18th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 165.4 hours / 6.89 days

item.title: Music for Dummies 2026
item.content:encoded:
The sweet sounds of savings have arrived to make your foray into musical stardom even easier with the 2026 Music for Dummies Bundle! The professionals from the For Dummies series are back again to help you unleash your inner musician. Learn a variety of digital instruments with in-depth lessons like eMedia Guitar For Dummies Level 1-2, eMedia Piano For Dummies Level 1-2, and eMedia Singing For Dummies Level 1-2. Take your passion for digital music to superstar levels of greatness, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase.

Keys expire. Please redeem before December 16th, 2026

Bundle ends: 2026-06-16T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 117.4 hours / 4.89 days

item.title: The Cybersecurity & AI Defense Mega Bundle by Packt
item.description: Defend your sensitive data with AI
item.content:encoded:
Nothing gets past our latest Humble Video Learning Bundle: The Cybersecurity & AI Defense Mega Bundle! Learn how to protect your digital world using AI defensive tactics with exceptional courses from Packt. Prepare for your new career with video learning courses like Cybersecurity Fundamentals & Certification Prep – ISC2 Pathway, Mastering Cybersecurity with Python - From Basics to Advanced Defense, AZ-500 - Microsoft Azure Security Technologies - A Prep Course, more. Go from zero to cybersecurity hero, and help support the Starlight Foundation with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-15T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 93.4 hours / 3.89 days

item.title: Ultimate AI Skills Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Don’t let the AI revolution pass you by—pay what you want for the Ultimate AI Skills Bundle and begin your learning journey today. Explore the ins and outs of ChatGPT with ChatGPT Course: Master AI for Work & Creativity, start selling your own AI imagery with Midjourney Course: Create & Monetize AI Art, master Adobe’s flagship AI tools with Adobe Firefly Course: AI-Powered Design, Illustration & Photography Tools, and more! Get the advice and knowledge you seek from expert-led courses, and help support Save the Children with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-12T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 21.4 hours / 0.89 days

item.title: Ultimate Environment & World Building Collection
item.content:encoded:
Gorgeous and easy to implement scenery options have arrived within one curated bundle. Add unmatched realism and polish to your next development cycle with ready-to-use environmental assets designed to save you time and money! Fill your games with lost shrines, Asian terraces, medieval fantasy villages, modular Viking village kits, and so much more—all with FAB Professional License Keys! Get the environmental assets you need to help bring your next big fantasy or sci-fi game to life and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 11th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-18T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 165.4 hours / 6.89 days

item.title: IK Multimedia Presents Studio Essentials: Pianos, Bass, Drums & Cinematic Sounds
item.content:encoded:
Create the perfect audioscape for your next game or creative project with IK Multimedia’s curated collection of studio essentials! Capture the magic of classic instruments from this extensive 1,000+ asset library of commercial-ready string, bass, and drum samples from themed packs like MODO BASS Studio Upright, Pianoverse - Grand Piano Y7, Miroslav Philharmonik 2, and more! Explore a variety of genres, from lo-fi to classical and everything in between. Get the assets you need to achieve the sound you’re looking for, and support Music Will with your purchase!

Keys Expire. Please redeem before June 2nd, 2027

Bundle ends: 2026-06-17T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 141.4 hours / 5.89 days

item.title: Build & Launch AI Apps Bundle
item.description: Build and launch AI apps in no time
item.content:encoded:
Build and launch AI apps in no time with a curated collection of twenty instructor-led courses by Zenva! Learn to harness Claude Code to vibe code a real-world slide presentation web app from start to finish and so much more! Access practical tools like live coding lessons where you can practice and instantly see the results of the changes you make to the code! Pay what you want for courses like AI-Assisted Development with Claude Code and Agentic AI with Claude Code & MCP today!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 8th, 2027.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-22T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 261.4 hours / 10.89 days

item.title: All-In-One 2D Game Dev Level Creation Pack
item.content:encoded:
Build entire game worlds faster with this massive Level Creation Bundle from GameDev Market. Designed to streamline your workflow, this collection gives you everything you need to create levels across multiple styles - from top-down and platformer to isometric environments and beyond. Jump straight into development with ready-to-use tilesets like Wolfsong Tilesets, Pixel Art Tileset Collection, Cartoon Platformer Tileset Pack, and more, all built to help you quickly design, iterate, and expand your worlds without starting from scratch. Stop piecing levels together asset-by-asset—get a complete toolkit to bring your ideas to life, and help support Girls Who Code with your purchase!

Keys expire. Please redeem before June 3rd, 2027. The coupon expires on August 31st, 2026.

The license agreement can be found here.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-17T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 141.4 hours / 5.89 days

item.title: The Ultimate GenAI & LLM Developer Bundle
item.content:encoded:
Learn how to create your own LLMs and GenAI that understand, generate, and process at lightning speed with an all-new Humble Video Learning Bundle. Jump-start your career with this 15+ course library, highlighted by The Complete LangChain & LLMs Guide and AI & LLM Engineering Mastery - GenAI, RAG Complete Guide, you’ll gain the knowledge and confidence you need to succeed in these challenging and in-demand fields. Pay what you want for the ultimate GenAI and LLM bundle, and help support the World Wildlife Fund with your purchase!

Bundle ends: 2026-06-15T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 93.4 hours / 3.89 days

item.title: Spring Into Creativity
item.content:encoded:
Unlock four elite editing software programs for one low price with the all-new Spring Into Creativity Bundle. Make every shot your best with the advanced photo editing tools in PaintShop Pro 2023. Save hours of time spent editing at your computer with the efficient AI-based solutions of AfterShot Pro 2023. Turn your best moments into unique movies with the easy-to-use editing software VideoStudio Pro. Create your own AI talking photos with PhotoMirage. Pay what you want for a comprehensive creative library and help support Extra Life with your purchase.

Bundle ends: 2026-06-14T18:00:00 UTC
Time left: 69.4 hours / 2.89 days
